basic_details.organization_name: Post Graduation Medical Degree (MD/MS/DNB) or equivalent in relevant discipline from a recognized University/Institute as under the Residency Scheme. All terms and conditions of the Scheme will be applicable.
basic_details.application_mode: Online only via AIIMS Guwahati official website
basic_details.short_information: AIIMS Guwahati Recruitment 2026: 129 Senior Resident vacancies. Apply online from 01 June to 15 June 2026 at aiimsguwahati.in.

salary_details.pay_scale: Medical: Pay Level-11 (Entry Pay Rs. 67,700/- + NPA + Allowances) | Non-Medical (M.Sc. PhD): Pay Level-10 (Rs. 56,100/- + Allowances) as per 7th CPC

selection_process: Personal Interview (based on online applications and document verification)
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates are required to fill up the Online Application along with relevant documents on the official AIIMS Guwahati website. The entire application process is online. Candidates should ensure they meet all eligibility criteria as on the closing date of online applications before applying. The candidature of applicants who fail to complete the online application by the stipulated date and time will not be considered.
seo_tags: AIIMS Guwahati Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 129 Posts
